title: The Evolution of Learning Capabilities: From Traditional ML to Deep Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating how deep learning overcomes key limitations of traditional machine learning, justifying its use by enabling automatic feature extraction and superior performance on complex data.
relationships: Traditional path relies on manual effort and domain expertise to create features, which becomes a bottleneck for complex data like images and text, leading to a performance limit.

Deep learning path processes raw data directly, using its multi-layered architecture to automatically learn hierarchical representations of features, enabling it to solve more complex problems without manual intervention.
